CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT sipHash64(value) AS SipHash FROM test_table;
SELECT sipHash64(value, id) AS SipHash FROM test_table;
SELECT sipHash64(array('value1', 'value2', 'value3'), toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00'), 12345) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 4);
CREATE TABLE hash_test (key String, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT sipHash64((key, value)) AS SipHash FROM hash_test;
SELECT sipHash64(value, x) FROM (SELECT value, id AS x FROM test_table) WHERE id <= 3;
SELECT sipHash64(array('First', 'Hash'), 'Second', SUM(id), AVG(id)) AS CombinedHash FROM test_table;
SELECT sipHash64('inputString', toString(id), toDateTime('2020-01-01 12:00:00')) AS HashValue FROM test_table WHERE id % 2 = 0;
SELECT sipHash64(array('data1', 'data2', 'data3'), 'extra', COUNT(*)) AS HashCount FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table GROUP BY value);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT sipHash64(array('tuple', 'test'), 'value', id) AS Hash FROM test_table;
SELECT DISTINCT Hash FROM temp_table WHERE Hash IS NOT NULL;
